description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a tan-colored frame and slide, contrasted by a black textured grip. The slide features prominent serrations along the top and rear for improved handling, as well as a rail system under the barrel for mounting accessories. The trigger guard is robust and slightly squared, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The grip is ergonomically contoured with a visible logo and stippled texture for enhanced control. The magazine base is flat and subtly beveled, blending seamlessly with the grip. Minimalistic iron sights are present on the slide, and the overall design suggests a tactical, high-performance firearm.
description: A tan semi-automatic handgun with a black textured grip, accessory rail, and serrated slide, designed for tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan slide with serrations, black ergonomic grip, and accessory rail under the barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight, and the width of the slide and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the slide serrations, grip texture, and the magazine base's contour.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the rear sight, slide width, and the backstrap of the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is black with a pronounced ergonomic contour, featuring a stippled texture for secure handling. It has a slight palm swell and finger grooves for comfort, and a visible logo is embedded in the center. The material appears to be a durable polymer or rubber composite, providing both grip and shock absorption. The backstrap is subtly curved, and the sides are slightly flattened for better control. The overall design emphasizes both function and comfort, with a tactical aesthetic.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick and robust, with a squared-off front edge and a gentle undercut at the rear for improved finger placement. It is generously sized to accommodate gloved fingers and features a smooth, matte finish. The guard integrates seamlessly with the frame, and there are no visible texturing or reinforcement ribs, giving it a clean, utilitarian look.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and has a non-threaded, smooth exterior profile. There are no visible compensators, ports, or suppressor threads. The finish matches the tan color of the slide, and the muzzle is cleanly cut with no additional markings or embellishments.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features subtle, shallow engravings, including a manufacturer logo and model name on the side, both rendered in a matching tan color for a low-profile appearance. There are no visible serial numbers or caliber designations. The markings are located just above the trigger area and are understated, blending into the overall tactical design.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly beveled, aligning smoothly with the bottom of the grip. It lacks any finger rest or extension, maintaining a streamlined profile. The base appears to be made of black polymer, matching the grip, and does not display any visible logos or texturing.
